examples.eng: Shall we begin with a prayer?
Many English words begin with c.
examples.ru: Многие английские слова начинаются с буквы "c".

examples.eng: To begin with, I did not see him.
All of their children's names begin with b.
examples.ru: Все имена их детей начинаются с буквы "b".

examples.eng: I'd like to begin with a few general comments.
examples.ru: Я хотел бы начать с нескольких общих замечаний.

examples.eng: I didn't break it! It was like that to begin with.
examples.ru: Я это не ломал! Оно было такое с самого начала.

examples.eng: The pain was severe to begin with, but soon passed off.
examples.ru: Сначала боль была очень сильной, но скоро прошла.

examples.eng: The kids helped me to begin with, but they soon got bored.
examples.ru: Сначала дети мне помогали, но скоро им стало скучно.

examples.eng: Well, to begin with, he shouldn't even have been driving my car.
examples.ru: Ну, начнём с того, что он вообще не должен был вести мою машину.

examples.eng: If we begin with the sovereign, and decimalize downwards, we come first to the florin.
examples.ru: Если начать с соверена деление на десять, то на первой ступени получим флорин.

examples.eng: 'Psychosis' begins with a P.
Her day begins with a workout.
The novel begins with a murder.
The word “ice” begins with i.
The word “foot” begins with f.
The word “hand” begins with h.
The word “quart” begins with q.
The word “ice” begins with an i.
The word “foot” begins with an f.
The word “hand” begins with an h.
The word “quart” begins with a q.
He began working with renewed vigour.
examples.ru: Он начал работать с удвоенной энергией.

examples.eng: The battle began with a cavalry charge.
The moose began kicking with her front legs.
Margaret began experimenting with watercolor.
My property begins with the three maple trees.
examples.ru: Моя собственность начинается с трёх кленовых деревьев.

examples.eng: The essay begins with a citation from 'Hamlet'.
The poem begins with an invocation of the Muses.
examples.ru: Поэма начинается с обращения к Музам.

examples.eng: The writer began with a description of the area.
The semester begins with a convocation ceremony.
examples.ru: Семестр начинается с церемонии посвящения в студенты.
